name: Menu Confirm
description: a bright positive blip confirming a menu choice

ai.prompt: A UI confirmation: a clean, positive soft chime with a gentle glassy ring, satisfying and modern. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
